episodes.title: The group called "The most dangerous cult in China" Eastern Lightning. (Full video)
episodes.description:
In the early nineties a new Christian religious group began to spread around the country which held somewhat alternative beliefs. Followers believed God had returned to save mankind in the form of a Chinese woman.
Over the years the group was linked to numerous violent incidents, many of the followers believing they were fighting back against evil demonic spirits. In two 2014  the secretive organisation was thrust into the public eye when six people linked to the church brutally and publicly ended the life of a woman who refused to give them her phone number in a branch of McDonalds.
Starting out as a small fringe sect of the local church movement in  northern China Eastern Lightning soon began spreading across the country, the numbers of followers rising from a few hundred to tens  of thousands. After the founder and his female christ fled overseas the supposed religion attracted followers abroad.
In the aftermath of the brutal assault on Wu Shuo Yan there was a general consensus that followers of the Church of The Almighty God were responsible. However, a counter narrative emerged claiming that those responsible actually followed different religious teachings and were not connected to the church.
